app.name: Hodor
app.tagline: Buk AI-second, buk accessibility findings ebe i nwere ike ịchọ, iji mee ihe ngwa ngwa na akwụkwọ akụkọ aka
about.what_body: Eita manual audits-loi accessibility findings-er ekta library. Tomar dekha jinish search kor, ekta description khoj jeta fit kore, tahole tomar report-re copy kor.
about.what_body_2: Hodor hodor hodor hodor. Hodor hodor hodor hodor hodor hodor. Hodor hodor hodor, hodor hodor hodor hodor hodor hodor hodor hodor.
about.what_wcag: Ei data WCAG 2.2 Level A tahole AA cover kore, jeta onek organizations use kore tahole onek legal accessibility requirements-er basis. Kicchu Level AAA Success Criteria-o include kora hoyese jekhanay accessibility community broadly failure pattern-ke significant mone kore.

about.feature_ai_body: AI use kor tomar notes-er upore bittik koiya ekta finding rewrite koriber loi. Anthropic, OpenAI, tahole Google theke tomar nijer API key ano. Eita tomar browser-re thake tahole amader kache kabú pathano hoy na. Setup kor
about.feature_languages_body: Ei library 50-er beshi language-re available, RTL support-shohit right-to-left languages-er loi. Amar language, culture, tahole linguistics-er loge love tahole fascination ase. Ei sob languages add kora ekta side quest chilo, ongshoté experiment, ongshoté rabbit hole, ongshoté kichu somoy-er loi plot hariye phela. Translations AI-generated, tai translation mistakes somporkay mone rakho. Corrections swagoto. Switch kor
about.feature_party_body: Hodor Hodor-hodor. Hodor Hodor. Hodor hodor hodor hodor hodor.
about.feature_a11y_body: WCAG 2.2 anusare banano. Focus management, live regions, full keyboard navigation, reduced motion support, tahole high-contrast color tokens include kore.

settings.ai_enable_desc: Descriptions bona/o Suggested Fix oi AI Instructions oi hegeregerena ia hamaoroa.
settings.privacy_body_1: Oihari, iboudiai localStorage oi hegeregerena oi browser lalonai koua. Asie siaia lao ita dekenai o server ta dekenai. Koua data ia aonega: theme, language, platform filter, Live Search setting, AI provider laina, API keys, rankings, stars, archived audia, pinned audia, recent findings, custom findings, corpus oi hamaoroa, bona oi murinai doana finding.
settings.privacy_body_2: API keys ibounai do browser dimu sibona danu AI provider oi korikorina hevalaimu vanena. Ita do laḡanima lalonai ese bema itaia o abia lasi. Oi do bema negea haraga negea AI settings lalonai, o browser site data negea unuseni.
settings.privacy_body_translations: UI translations bona base public corpus ai do AI ese translated henia vadaeni bona dika be namo lasi. User ese torea data, custom findings, o personal edits be translate totona lalonai lasi.

settings.reduced_motion_note: Reduced motion on ase. Confetti-r moto animations skip kora hoy. Inágula abar enable koriber loi, tomar OS accessibility settings-re reduced motion off kor.
settings.wcag_filter_desc: Hodor hodor hodor WCAG hodor hodor hodor hodor. Hodor hodor hodor hodor hodor hodor hodor hodor.

results.copy_link_aria: [EN] Copy link to these search results
search.hint_pin: [EN] Pin any result to keep it at the top across all views.
about.feature_pinning_body: Pin any finding to keep it at the top across all searches and views. Use the priority arrows to rank others, star to float a finding to the very top, or archive to remove it from view.
settings.pinned_results_desc: Items you've pinned appear above all search results.
settings.agentic_mode_desc: AI will search your corpus to match your style and technical depth when rewriting.
detail.agentic_mode_help: AI searches the corpus to match your style and depth when rewriting
detail.agentic_mode_hint: AI will search the corpus to match your established style and technical depth
common.sponsored_body: Nataa mgbasa ozi site n'aka ụlọ ọrụ dị na mpaghara accessibility na ndị mmepụta ihe. A na-asọpụrụ nzuzo gị, enweghị śledzenie, enweghị profil, enweghị algọridim.
onboarding.heading: Nnọọ na A11yFred
onboarding.confirm_body: Ị erughị njedebe nke tour ahụ. Mechie ugbu a wee hapụ ndị ọzọ?
onboarding.slide_1_body: Kọọ ihe i hụrụ: aha akụkụ, ihe omume, ma ọ bụ WCAG success criterion. Jiri filters Platform na WCAG Level belata corpus. Jiri Narrow Results iji lọ n'ime ihe na-egosi ugbu a. A na-ahazi nsochiàlà site n'ịdị mkpa, wee dị ka oke ọjọọ.
onboarding.slide_2_body: Jiri Rank Up/Down iji tọọ nsochiàlà ogo site n'ịdị mkpa. Kpọnwee ihe ịchọpụta iji gosipụta ya na mbụ mgbe niile. Pin ihe ịchọpụta iji jide ya na elu n'ime ọchọchọ niile.
onboarding.slide_3_body: Aête êkta finding hûlate oiyé taár title, WCAG criterion, description, abôr suggested fix deikté paiybá. Description-t location prefix zog diyó (masolan 'Global:'). AI Assist bébor ori jékkun field-o tomar notes diyé thik kortê paiybá, tarpor field alag alag copy kortê paiybá naile Copy All bébor ori ekbaret sob kichu niyé liyó.
search.hint_platform_native_caveat: Nchịkọta ngwa ọhụụ dị obere karịa nke weebụ.
search.hint_ranking: Jiri Rank Up/Down iji hazie ka nsochiàlà na-ahazi. Kpọnwee nsochiàlà iji gosipụta ya na mbụ mgbe niile.
search.hint_syntax_prefix: Jiri +term iji chọọ okwu ma jiri -term iji wepụ ya (dịka
search.narrow_clear_and_reset_aria: Hichapụ narrow filter ma laghachi na ọchọchọ zuru oke

search.view_all_confirm_pinned: A pinned nsochiàlà {count} ma na-egosi ha mgbe niile.

results.sort_live_hint: Yɛɛr tɛ ye cɔl. Dɛɛc bɛ lɛc tɛ yic kɛ ŋɔt ye wɛl.
results.summary_query: '{query}' haggôt result deikkaiyé, '{sort}' diyé sajano, '{narrow}' diyé chokkho, {platform}.
results.sort_smart_info: Lɛc luɔi ye kɛ kɔr yen ɣɔn, tɛ kɛ yɛɛr kɔc tɔu. Dɛɛc wɛl bɛ tɔu ɣɔn; Dɛɛc tɛ bɛ tɔu wɛl. Ye lɛc tɛ kɔr.
results.sort_wcag_level_info: AAA kɔr ye cɔl ŋɔt yic. Kɔr AAA bɛ tɛ cɔl, tɛ kɔc AAA bɛ lɔk yen kɔr luɔi.
results.sort_popularity_info: Yic tɛ ŋot, bɛ cɔl lɔk kɔc kɛ tɔu. Yen tɛ, lɔk ye yic tɛ bɛ wɛl kɛ app.
results.rank_hint: Lɛc dɛɛc wɛl kɔc lɛc. Wɛl ɣɔn. Tɛ kɔc. (Bɛ lɔ.)
results.unpin_from_search: Dɛɛc tɛ ye tɔu. Lɔ tɛ bɛ yic dɛɛc.

detail.finding_note_hint: Tɛɛ waaʼ hɔ: cɔ̃ɔ̃, ŋaŋ ŋaŋ, kɛ waaʼ bì kɛŋ. Hɔ AI Assist bì
detail.finding_note_hint_suffix: kɛ gɔɔ waaʼ bɛɛ bì ŋaŋ.
detail.ai_revision_placeholder: e.g. waaʼ bì kɛŋ mobile, waaʼ bì tooltip
detail.finding_note_placeholder: e.g. Ŋaŋ kɔɔ, kɔɔ Onboarding bɛɛ. Ŋaŋ bì kɛŋ gɔɔ bì kɛ hɔ bɛɛ.

detail.ai_revision_error_invalid_key: API kɛŋ bì gɔɔ kɛ bì ŋeeŋ ({provider}). Kɔɔ kɛŋ bì Settings.
detail.ai_revision_error_rate_limit: Rate limit kɔɔ ({provider}). Tɛɛ kɛ kɛŋ kɛ hɔ kɛŋ.

help.take_tour_description: Hɔ onboarding tour kɛŋ kɛ kɔɔ A11yFred waaʼ.
help.step_1_body: Hotemarem aisé gari type ger. Settings-re Platform filter use ker Web tahole Native App findings choose koriber loi (onek web-focused). +term use ker ekta word require koriber loi tahole -term use ker exclude koriber loi (e.g. keyboard +screen reader -wcag2.2).
help.step_2_body: Hotemarem result-re Rank Up tahole Rank Down button ase rank change koriber loi. Ekta result Star kor jate hori aage aise. Jokono result Pin kor jate hori sob searches-re uproté thake.
help.step_3_body: Oi finding select kor jeta tomar dekha jinishér loge best matches kore. Results aage relevance diye sort hoy, tarpor severity diye.
help.step_4_body: Description-t location prefix zog diyó (masolan 'Global:' naile 'Cart:'). Jodi AI Assist calu thaké, tomar notes Revision Notes field-t likhó abôr AI finding-taré tomar context anujayé notun koré likhiyé dibó.
help.step_5_body: Description tahole suggested fix tomar spreadsheet tahole report-re copy kor. Copy All use ker ekbáre dui field grab koriber loi.
help.shortcuts_note: Shortcuts sobé active hoy jokhan focus result list-re thake. Inágula use ker diyé list na chharía diyé findings navigate tahole rate koriber loi.
help.shortcut_rank_up: Shift + ↑ = Ekhonkár result rank up kor
help.shortcut_rank_down: Shift + ↓ = Ekhonkár result rank down kor
about.what_body_2_prefix: Ekoi somossa prায় sob site-re aise. Ei tool tomar descriptions reports-er modhye consistent rakhe jate tumi hotemáre scratch theke likhte na hoy. Library real audit work theke banano hoyese, tarpor AI diye plain language, consistency, accuracy, tahole fact-checking-er loi refined hoyese
about.feature_agentic_body: Tumi jodi Claude (Anthropic) use kor, tumi Match Existing Style-o enable korte paro. AI past revision examples search korbo tone tahole depth match koriber loi jeta tumi already establish koresho, sobé ekhonkár finding isolation-re rewrite na koriya.
about.examples_ath010_label: Control Label Purpose-er Badle Appearance Describe Kore
settings.party_confirm_body: Jinishpotro khub weird tahole possibly inaccessible hoibo jaise.
settings.pending_save_note: {unsaved} Apply koriber loi {save} button press kor.
settings.language_rhg_body_1: Ei translation AI-generated tahole Rohingya native speakers review na koriya.
settings.language_rhg_body_2: Rohingya manush genocide tahole jabar nishti porase. Ei translation sombhram diye use kor, tahole corrections contribute koriber loi consider kor jodi paro.
settings.platform_all_desc: Web, native apps, tahole documents-er sob results dekhao.
settings.ranking_on: Ranking kontrolia itaia result tamona tamona ruanai.
settings.starred_results_desc: Starred audia iboudiai goada kava daekau lao, starred dalana hegeregerena.
settings.archived_results_desc: Archived audia iboudiai results edia murimurina dekenai itaia.
settings.rankings_desc: Goada bona kakamui rank oi results dekenai henia. Result ta haida dekenai badina goada rank ia kamonai, search dekenai kava dae.
settings.confirm_reset_all_intro: Ia karaia murinai hamauria diba lasi.
